nodes.name: Homemade Pizza Night — Mild-Spice Wrap
nodes.description: name: Homemade Pizza Night — Mild-Spice Wrap | short_description: Mild pizza-inspired wrap with whole-wheat crust, tomato sauce, mozzarella, mushrooms, and bell pepper — a fiber-rich, veggie-forward d
nodes.premise: Meal: Homemade Pizza Night — Mild-Spice Wrap - name: Homemade Pizza Night — Mild-Spice Wrap | short_description: Mild pizza-inspired wrap with whole-wheat crust, tomato sauce, mozzarella, mushrooms, and bell pepper — a fiber-rich, veggie-forward dish with calcium and protein. | meal_suggestion: Serve as a 1-wrap portion; pair with a large green salad and water to create a balanced meal. | nutrition_note: Fiber from whole-wheat crust supports fullness; vegetables add vitamins, while mozzarella provides protein and calcium. Monitor sodium and saturated fat from cheese and sauce; for a lighter option, use part-skim mozzarella and a bit less cheese, and pair with a side salad to boost fiber.

nodes.premise: Meal: Baked Salmon Plate — Maple-Kissed Bake - name: Baked Salmon Plate — Maple-Kissed Bake | short_description: Baked salmon with lemon, served with mixed vegetables and rice. | meal_suggestion: Serve salmon with a squeeze of lemon over a bed of rice and accompany with steamed or roasted mixed vegetables for a balanced plate. | nutrition_note: High-protein meal with omega-3 fats from salmon; complex carbohydrates from rice; fiber and micronutrients from mixed vegetables; vitamin C from lemon. Low in added sugars unless a glaze is used.

nodes.premise: Meal: Chicken Fajita Bowl — Sesame Wrap - name: Chicken Fajita Bowl — Sesame Wrap | short_description: A protein-forward fajita bowl with chicken, peppers, onion, rice, and avocado, finished with sesame-inspired flavor. | meal_suggestion: For more fiber or lower glycemic load, swap white rice for brown rice or cauliflower rice, and keep avocado. If making a wrap, use a sesame wrap with the same fillings and consider adding salsa or lime for brightness. | nutrition_note: Protein-rich chicken with peppers and onion provides fiber and micronutrients; rice supplies energy with carbohydrates; avocado adds heart-healthy fats and satiety. Sesame wrap variation can add extra fats and flavor. Salt content depends on seasoning.
